concept.theme_description: Explore the lush, dense layers of tropical foliage.

colors: Subtle hints of vibrant reds and oranges

no_outlines_approach.purpose: To emphasize form and depth through color gradients and contrasts rather than defining shapes with hard edges.
no_outlines_approach.execution: Start with lighter colors at the top of the canvas, progressively adding darker shades and details to suggest the canopy layers and undergrowth. Allow colors to blend at their borders to create soft, undefined boundaries that evoke the sense of a dense, intertwined landscape.

visual_elements.dominant_shape: Irregular, organic shapes created by color transitions rather than explicit forms.
